ACCOUNT RECOVERY
STEP 1 OF 3

FORGOT PASSWORD

Enter the email address linked to your account and we’ll send a one-time code to verify you.

Your password has been reset. Sign in with your new password.
Send reset code

We’ll send a single-use code to your inbox so you can continue securely.

Keep your Gmail or inbox open. The code is time-sensitive and can be resent after the timer ends.

Check your email

Enter the one-time code we sent to your email.

01:00

The timer protects your account from repeated requests. You can choose a different email if needed.

Create a new password

Choose a strong password and confirm it below to complete the reset.

Passwords must match before we submit the reset to Clerk.
